title: Letter E Adventure
description: Explore the letter E with elephant, egg, and eagle
learningObjectives: Identify E-words: elephant, egg, eagle, elbow, engine

characters.prompt: Friendly cartoon tutor character, neutral expression, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, happy smiling expression, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, thinking expression, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, encouraging expression, thumbs up, simple 2D style, transparent background
Friendly cartoon tutor character, waving hand, simple 2D style, transparent background

objects.prompt: Cute cartoon gray elephant, big ears, trunk up, simple 2D style, transparent background
Cartoon white egg with small cracks, simple 2D style, transparent background
Cartoon majestic eagle, brown and white, wings spread, simple 2D style, transparent background
Cartoon arm showing elbow bend, simple anatomical illustration, transparent background
Cartoon train engine, steam locomotive, simple 2D style, transparent background

letters.prompt: Cartoon uppercase letter E, red color, playful 3D-ish style, bold outlines, transparent background
Cartoon lowercase letter e, red color, playful rounded style, transparent background

backgrounds.prompt: Warm kindergarten classroom interior, soft pastel colors, flat illustration style
African savanna landscape with elephants, acacia trees, warm sunset colors, flat cartoon style
Eagle nest high on mountain cliff, blue sky, clouds, flat cartoon style

ui.prompt: Green play button, rounded rectangle, white triangle icon, transparent background
Orange next button, rounded rectangle, white arrow, transparent background
Filled yellow star, achievement indicator, transparent background
Horizontal progress bar UI, red fill, rounded ends, transparent background
Green checkmark, success indicator, transparent background

narration.text: Excellent! You're here! Ready to meet the letter E?
This is the letter E. It says eh-eh-eh like elephant!
Excellent finding! Look for E things!
Extraordinary! You know five letters! A, B, C, D, and E! You're a letter superstar!

feedback.text: Almost! E says eh like egg.
